linkedin_profile.headline: Vice President Commercial at The Red Carnation Hotel Collection (Red Carnation Hotels)
linkedin_profile.about:
With a robust leadership role at Red Carnation Hotels, my focus is on shaping global commercial strategies for an exquisite collection of luxury boutique hotels. The heart of my role lies in managing and strategically developing sales, marketing, revenue, distribution, and reservations teams. Success in these areas has been marked by the launch of four new properties, creating a central reservations office, leading significant technology projects such as Opera Cloud PMS, Salesforce CRM and a guest service app, whilst showcasing a commitment to sustainable luxury in the hospitality industry. Collaborating closely with strategic agency partnerships, we have optimized revenue growth opportunities across 18 properties worldwide. My approach is both creative and data-driven, ensuring that every decision aligns with our mission to deliver unparalleled customer experiences. This includes a keen emphasis on customer acquisition, conversion, retention, and cross/up-selling, all while fostering authentic, purpose-driven initiatives that support sustainable travel.

Total Experience: 23 years

experience.title: Floor Supervisor
experience.description: Responsible for maintaining the cleanliness and supply of all allocated areas to the standard set by the Hilton Hotel. Ensured that maintenance issues were reported and followed up promptly and correctly. Responsible for office administration in accordance with departmental procedures. Responsible for the supervision and primary discipline of staff of all allocated areas, to cooperate with other departments as directed. Managed Health & Safety standards and COSHH. As TBS trainer I did on the job training and assessment of the standards within the department and liaised with the HR department regarding training needs. Finished the “Hilton University's Becoming a Manager” Involved in Refurbishment. Department: Operations • Level: Specialist

experience.title: Assistant Executive Housekeeper
experience.description: Assisted in the direction and management of the cleaning and maintenance of the hotel bedrooms and public areas designated to the Housekeeping Department (40-50 members of staff) achieving five star standards in both guest service and cleanliness and maintaining the fabric of the building. Responsible for all the training for staff in the Housekeeping Department. Responsible for managing payroll; attending and conducting meetings as required, interviewing new employees and in general fully assisting the Executive Housekeeper in every departmental aspect. Deputised for the Executive Housekeeper in her absence. Attended all 15 modules of Marriot's Essential skills training; Dirt School. Won the Leader of the Year award in 2007. Involved in Refurbishment. Department: Administrative • Level: Specialist

experience.title: Executive Head Housekeeper
experience.organization: The Milestone Hotel & Residences - part of The Red Carnation Hotel Collection
experience.description: Responsible for the operational and strategic management of the Housekeeping department(40+ members of staff) including recruitment and selection, training and development, performance management, payroll and cost management, budget setting and forecasting. • Attended a variety of management training courses: Appraisals Skills, H&S and Finance for RCH Managers; Managing People & Performance; Recruitment & Selection; Fire Marshall. • Won Manager of the Quarter and Manager of the year award few times during my tenure. • Won Red Carnation Housekeeper of the Year Award 2010. • Improved HK standards to an average of 98.1% on Mystery shopper results throughout the years. • Achieved several times a 100% AA Inspection. • Nominated for Catey Awards 2011 and shortlisted for AA Awards 2012 and 2014; nominated for Housekeeper of the year AA awards 2017 • Introduced several new room check standards and created SOP`s • Made several significant savings on my cost lines and POR`s (in guest and cleaning supplies, contract cleaning) without compromising standards. • Involved regularly in many refurbishments • Won Excellence by an Operations/Line Manager 2012 in HR Hospitality awards • Won Best Housekeeping Team Initiative Award 2016 – Springboard 2016 awards for Excellence • Won AA Housekeeper of 2017-2018 • Won Housekeeper of the Year 2019 CATEYS 2019 • Part of the Executive Team at the Milestone and chairing the regional Housekeeping and Maintenance meetings for Red Carnation Company • Overseeing & mentoring both Guernsey RCH properties – Duke of Richmond and Old Government House since 2018 • Contributing to achieving 5 star FORBES, awarded in February 2020. Department: Operations • Level: Head
